title: Implement code-only authentication system with persistent login

requirements.text: Modify the backend to store user sessions that map unique codes to user identities, allowing users to authenticate by entering only their unique code without requiring Internet Identity login after initial registration

quotes: there will be a unique customur code only one time by useing this code a people can access this side and chat just entering the single code and start chart nothing more

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores a mapping between unique numeric codes and user identities
Users can authenticate by providing only their unique code
No password or Internet Identity verification required after initial registration
Authentication persists across devices when using the same unique code

requirements.text: Update the registration flow so that after a user registers and receives their unique code, they are automatically authenticated and can immediately start using the chat without additional login steps

quotes: only first time custmour need to register to get the code after getting the unique id they can chat promn any where

acceptanceCriteria: After registration, users are immediately logged in
Users can access chat functionality without a second login step
The unique code is stored locally for future sessions

requirements.text: Create a simplified login page where returning users can enter their unique code to authenticate and access the chat from any device without requiring Internet Identity or password

quotes: using any device there will not be any second varification to start the chart by entering the unique id . just enter unoique id and start chart

acceptanceCriteria: Login page has a single input field for the unique code
Entering a valid code authenticates the user immediately
Works consistently across different devices and browsers
No Internet Identity or password prompt appears

requirements.text: Remove the Internet Identity authentication requirement from the Header, ConnectPage, and ChatPage components, replacing it with code-based authentication checks

quotes: just enter unoique id and start chart

acceptanceCriteria: Users authenticated via unique code can access all chat features
Internet Identity login/logout UI is removed from the header
ConnectPage and ChatPage check for code-based authentication instead of Internet Identity

requirements.text: Implement persistent code-based session storage so that users remain authenticated across page refreshes and browser restarts until they explicitly log out

quotes: after getting the unique id they can chat promn any where and using any device

acceptanceCriteria: User's unique code is stored in browser local storage
User remains logged in after closing and reopening the browser
Session ends only when user explicitly logs out

constraints: Keep the existing user registration system that generates unique numeric codes
Preserve the existing connection system and chat interface structure
Do not modify immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity hooks, main.tsx, components/ui)
nonGoals: Supporting OAuth or social login providers
